html:
IntelliSOFT Consulting Limited

Welcome 👋

Welcome to your ICL Staff Portal. This is your central hub for everything you need to stay connected, organised, and productive as part of the IntelliSOFT Consulting team.

This platform is designed to streamline and simplify various administrative and operational processes, ensuring a more efficient and organized work environment.

Here's what you can do on this platform:
HR & People Management
Manage employee records, leave requests, and HR processes seamlessly.
Finance & Expenses
Submit and track expense claims, approvals, and financial requests with ease.
Project & Task Tracking
Stay on top of your deliverables, deadlines, and project milestones.
Internal Communication
Access company announcements, updates, and important notices all in one place.
Reports & Analytics
Generate and view reports to support data-driven decisions across teams.
Compliance & Administration
Handle administrative tasks and ensure organisational compliance effortlessly.
Head over to your ICL Staff workspace on the sidebar to get started
name: Welcome
